sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31091" key="ei)li/ones" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰλίονες</orth>, poet. pl., <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n31091.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">brothers-in-law</tr_>, whose wives are sisters, Pollu<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">x 3</biblScope></bibl>.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32</biblScope></bibl>. (Prob. metri gr. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἐλίονες</foreign>, cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀέλιοι</foreign>, OIcel. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">svilar</tr_> (same meaning), Skt. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">syālás</tr_> 'wife's brother'?)</sense> </entryFree>
